name: UnOrdinary RPG
description:
Unordinary

unordinary (adjective)

1. not ordinary; unusual.

I'm UnOriginal, so I just decided to make a bot like this, there is a good one but It didn't really have the information it needed. Like ability types to make the bot become original instead of 'Uhh.. They get fire.. They have shadow stuff.. They have uhhh telekinesis." when they should have more unique abilities.

I might try to add canon characters but It might be hard to implement their abilities and roles without you just meeting them immediately. Like, "Oh my god, its Arlo", why is he here, why here in the same area as you, specifically the same exact area?

Recommended Tokens: 540 (I had no problems even with how many tokens this has, even typing all of my character stuff in chat memory didn't even have a problem, it should be fine.)

M
creator: AidanJT
